display.purpose: Financial amounts on KPI cards. Always tabular-nums. Hanken Grotesk 700.

headline.purpose: Section titles, modal headers, page-level view names. Hanken Grotesk 700.

title.purpose: Card headings, list group headers, sidebar wordmark. Inter 600.

body.purpose: Transaction descriptions, metadata, form labels. Inter 400. Max 60–70ch.

label.purpose: KPI card metric identifiers only — uppercase tracked. Inter 700. One per card max.

mono.purpose: Every monetary amount without exception. JetBrains Mono, tabular-nums.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: KPI cards at rest. Separates card from base without drawing attention.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Interactive card hover state. Paired with translateY(-2px).

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Toggle knob slide, card lift, theme switch.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar becomes visible; single-column layout below.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA: save, confirm, submit. Black fill, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #111827; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; line-height: 1; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1f2937; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #111827; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #374151; transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Cancel, back, secondary actions. Transparent with border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #111827; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 12px 24px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease, border-color 0.15s ease; line-height: 1; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f9fafb; border-color: #d1d5db; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #111827; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KPI Card — Income
components.description: The signature financial KPI surface. Top border encodes income/expense tone. Split-numeral display amount.
components.html:
INGRESOS DEL MES

$1.250.000

Transf. recibidas
$300.000
components.css: .ds-summary-card { padding: 24px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-top-width: 3px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(0 0 0 / 0.05); display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; } .ds-summary-card--income { border-top-color: #10b981; } .ds-summary-card--expense { border-top-color: #ef4444; } .ds-summary-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.07), 0 2px 4px -2px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.07); } .ds-summary-card__header { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; } .ds-summary-card__label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; color: #9ca3af; padding-top: 4px; } .ds-summary-card__icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 12px; background: #ecfdf5; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-summary-card--expense .ds-summary-card__icon { background: #fef2f2; } .ds-summary-card__amount { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: clamp(1.875rem, 3.5vw, 2.75rem); font-weight: 700; color: #111827; line-height: 1.05; letter-spacing: -0.02em; margin-top: 12px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-summary-card__decimal { font-size: 0.55em; color: #d1d5db; } .ds-summary-card__pill { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-top: 20px; } .ds-summary-card__pill-label { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; color: #6b7280; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; min-width: 0; overflow: hidden; } .ds-summary-card__pill-label span { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-summary-card__pill-amount { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; color: #10b981; flex-shrink: 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-summary-card--expense .ds-summary-card__pill-amount { color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Transaction Row
components.description: A single transaction list item: emoji icon, description + category, right-aligned Mono amount.
components.html:
🛒
MercadoAlimentación · Hoy
−$45.000
components.css: .ds-tx-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; transition: background 0.1s ease; cursor: pointer; } .ds-tx-row:hover { background: #f9fafb; } .ds-tx-row__icon { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 12px; background: #f3f4f6; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-tx-row__body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-tx-row__desc { display: block; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #111827; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-tx-row__meta { display: block; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-tx-row__amount { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 700; flex-shrink: 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-tx-row__amount--income { color: #10b981; } .ds-tx-row__amount--expense { color: #ef4444; } .ds-tx-row__amount--transfer { color: #111827; } .ds-tx-row__more { padding: 4px; color: #9ca3af; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.1s ease, background 0.1s ease; } .ds-tx-row:hover .ds-tx-row__more { opacity: 1; } .ds-tx-row__more:hover { background: #e5e7eb; color: #374151; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav
components.description: Sidebar navigation: Ledger Black active state, muted gray default, rounded-xl items.
components.html: ResumenMovimientosCuentas
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; background: transparent; transition: background 0.15s ease, color 0.15s ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #f9fafb; color: #374151; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: #111827; color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-item--active:hover { background: #1f2937; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field: stroke border, white fill, focus shifts border to Ledger Black.
components.css: .ds-input-group { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; } .ds-input-label { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #374151; } .ds-input { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #111827; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #d1d5db; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #111827; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #f3f4f6; color: #9ca3af; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Type Toggle (GASTO / INGRESO)
components.description: Pill toggle that slides between expense (red) and income (green) states. Signature modal component.
components.css: .ds-type-toggle { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #f3f4f6; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px; position: relative; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui; width: fit-content; } .ds-type-toggle__knob { position: absolute; top: 4px; left: 4px; height: calc(100% - 8px); width: calc(50% - 4px); border-radius: 9999px; transition: transform 0.2s ease, background 0.2s ease; pointer-events: none; } .ds-type-toggle__knob--expense { background: #ef4444; } .ds-type-toggle__knob--income { background: #10b981; transform: translateX(100%); } .ds-type-toggle__opt { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 20px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6b7280; cursor: pointer; position: relative; z-index: 1; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-type-toggle__opt--active { color: #ffffff; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview:
FinControl's visual system is built on a single principle: the ledger. Not a banking app, not a SaaS dashboard — a well-kept record. Every element earns its place the way an entry earns its place in a ledger: by carrying information. Decoration without meaning is wasted ink.

The system is monochromatic by design. Ledger Black (#111827) is the sole accent color. Income and expense are marked in semantic green and red — not as brand choices, but as signals, the way a bookkeeper uses red ink for debits. Everything else is neutral. Color appears not because it was sprinkled for visual interest, but because it means something.

The experience should feel like opening a trusted report: clear headers, tight rows, number-forward typography. Both light and dark themes are first-class. In light mode, the surface is near-white with black ink — like paper. In dark mode, it's a deep navy-black with muted slate text — like a backlit terminal at night. Neither theme is an afterthought.
keyCharacteristics: Numbers are the hero: financial amounts use JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums alignment, always
Color is a signal, not a style — only income green, expense red, warning amber appear in color
Light and dark themes are designed at equal fidelity; hardcoded hex values in components are forbidden
Density is earned: compact by default, nothing padded for visual comfort alone
The accent (--accent) inverts per theme: Ledger Black in light, near-white in dark

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Semantic colors (green, red, amber, blue) appear only when they encode financial or interaction meaning. Using Income Green as a decorative brand accent, a button tint, or a heading color is prohibited.

rules.name: The Monochrome Rule
rules.body: There is no brand color beyond Ledger Black. If you reach for a tint, a gradient, or any chromatic hue not listed as a semantic signal — stop. The palette has no room for it.

rules.name: The Mono Rule
rules.body: Every monetary amount uses JetBrains Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. Proportional digits in financial data break column alignment and are a readability failure.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels (text-[11px] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest) are permitted only on KPI card metric identifiers. They must not appear as section eyebrows, modal headers, or navigation labels anywhere else.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Shadows are a state, not a style. shadow-sm (resting) separates cards from base. shadow-md (lifted) responds to hover. shadow-lg (floating) signals overlay. Never apply shadow-lg to a resting surface.

dos: Do use JetBrains Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums for every monetary amount, on every screen, without exception.
Do express income and expense exclusively in semantic green (#10b981) and red (#ef4444) — color serves as a ledger signal, not a decorative choice.
Do treat Ledger Black as the sole brand accent: primary buttons, nav active states, the wordmark, active form borders — and nothing else.
Do route every color through design tokens (--bg-*, --text-*, --border, --accent). Never hardcode hex values inside components.
Do use rounded-3xl (24px) for KPI cards, rounded-xl (12px) for inputs/nav items/icon containers, rounded-md (8px) for chips and small cells.
Do apply --shadow-sm to resting cards, --shadow-md to hovered interactive cards, --shadow-lg to floating overlays.
Do suppress number input spinners globally.
Do keep uppercase tracking labels exclusively for KPI card metric identifiers, never for section eyebrows or modal titles.
donts: Don't use consumer banking aesthetics: saturated gradient backgrounds, oversized rounded bubbles, color fills as brand expression (Nequi, Nubank, Daviplata).
Don't use generic SaaS dashboard patterns: blue-everywhere chart cards, hero metric grids, admin-template card layouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or decorative gradients anywhere.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left or border-right > 1px in a brand color) on cards, list rows, or callouts.
Don't use semantic signal colors for anything that isn't encoding income, expense, success, or danger.
Don't use Hanken Grotesk for body text, metadata, or labels.
Don't add uppercase-tracked eyebrows above page sections, modal titles, or navigation group labels.
Don't reuse the gradient avatar pattern (from-indigo-400 to-purple-500) as a component pattern elsewhere in the app.
